persona.name: Sara
persona.description: Non-technical clinic administrator who needs forms for patient intake. No programming or database experience. Uses Google Forms occasionally.

initialIntent:
## Purpose
Create a patient intake form for our orthopedic clinic with insurance details and medical history focused on musculoskeletal conditions.

## Audience
Patients visiting the orthopedic clinic for the first time.

## Constraints
Must capture insurance provider and policy details. Pain assessment using a standardized scale is required.
finalIntent:
# Orthopedic Clinic Patient Intake Form

## Form Purpose
This form collects comprehensive patient information for first-time visitors to an orthopedic clinic. It captures essential demographic data, insurance coverage details, and musculoskeletal-focused medical history to facilitate proper diagnosis and treatment planning.

## Target Audience
New patients scheduling their first appointment at the orthopedic clinic, typically individuals experiencing bone, joint, muscle, or connective tissue issues.

## Key Data Collection Requirements

### Personal Information
- Full name, date of birth, and contact details
- Emergency contact information

### Insurance Information
- Insurance provider name and type
- Policy number and group number
- Primary policyholder details

### Medical History
- Current musculoskeletal complaints and symptoms
- Pain assessment using standardized 0-10 numeric scale
- Previous orthopedic injuries or surgeries
- Current medications
- Relevant medical conditions affecting bones, joints, or muscles

### Clinical Assessment
- Primary reason for visit
- Location and duration of symptoms
- Activities that aggravate or relieve symptoms

## Validation Requirements
- All insurance fields are mandatory
- Pain scale must use standardized 0-10 rating
- Contact information must be valid and complete
schemaDescription: 25 fields: First Name*, Last Name*, Date of Birth*, Email Address*, Phone Number*, Emergency Contact Name*, Emergency Contact Phone*, Insurance Provider*, Insurance Type*, Policy Number*, Group Number, Policyholder Name*, Relationship to Policyholder*, Primary Reason for Visit*, Affected Body Area*, Current Pain Level*, How Long Have You Had These Symptoms?*, Cause of Injury/Pain*, Previous Orthopedic Surgeries, Previous Fractures or Broken Bones
provenanceSummary: Intent updated once. 0 opinion resolutions recorded.
